_name: fresh-design → spawn designer @1
design + MOVE@current (judgement) → advance to development
design + worker running, not expired, no completion → noop
design + lease EXPIRED, no completion → reclaim (bump to @2)
FENCING: stale MOVE@1 (terminal=null at cur=2) + expired → reclaim, NOT advance
development + output (PR NOTE) + ci_green=success → advance to testing
development + output + ci_green=pending → noop (wait)
development + output + ci_green=failure, no lease → re-spawn developer to fix
development + output + ci_green=absent → noop (FAIL-CLOSED, do not advance)
testing + output + tests_green=success → advance to done
testing + REJECT@current → advance-backward to development
open QUESTION not parked → block + route
blocked + answer received → unblock
blocked + deadline passed, no answer → escalate
transition budget exceeded → escalate (termination backstop)
bounce limit exceeded → escalate
malformed card (two stage labels) → escalate
done (terminal) → noop
REGRESSION: post-advance idempotent re-run (stale design MOVE, now at development) → spawn developer @2, not re-advance
REGRESSION: reclaim uses stage owner (developer), not stale lease.role (designer)
REGRESSION: REJECT on undefined backward edge (design→analysis) → escalate, no illegal stage write
REGRESSION: mechanical MOVE@cur + ci failure + LIVE unexpired lease → noop (no double-spawn)
REGRESSION: leaseExpired fail-closed when config lacks skew (uses default skew=0 here) — active lease past ttl → reclaim
SECURITY: dev + payments file changed + advisor not reviewed + ci green → spawn security-advisor
SECURITY: dev + .env file changed (glob **/.env*) → spawn security-advisor
SECURITY: dev + NON-watched file + ci green → advance (advisor not triggered)
SECURITY: advisor dispatched + lease held + not yet reviewed → noop (no double-spawn)
SECURITY: dev + payments file + advisor reviewed (no veto) + ci green → advance to testing
SECURITY: dev + payments file + advisor VETO open + ci green → veto-hold (parks, escalates @human)
SECURITY: veto:held + still vetoed (no CLEAR) → noop (parked, fail-closed)
SECURITY: veto:held + accountable CLEAR (veto_open=false) → veto-clear (remove label)
EPIC: analysis + no lease → spawn analyst @1
EPIC: analysis + analyst MOVE@cur → advance to decompose
EPIC: decompose + no lease → spawn analyst
EPIC: integrating + 1/3 children done → noop (fan-in barrier)
EPIC: integrating + 0 children -> escalate (anomalous; budget cannot catch a barrier parked forever)
EPIC: integrating + 3/3 children done → advance to done (fan-in complete)
SECURITY: dev + watched file + advisor HOLD open (not escalated) + ci green → advisor-hold (escalate @human, NOT advance)
SECURITY: HOLD open + already escalated → noop (parked, awaiting human CLEAR/ACK)
SECURITY: HOLD cleared by human ACK (hold_open=false) + reviewed → advance to testing
SECURITY: HOLD open + PR files drifted OFF watch_paths → still advisor-hold (watch-drift backstop, NOT advance)
SECURITY: HOLD open AND VETO open → veto-hold (binding beats non-binding)
SECURITY: HOLD open (not escalated) + agent_running → advisor-hold with clear-lease
SECURITY: dev + contact-discipline file changed (new email/messaging glob) → spawn security-advisor
REWORK: development + output_present=false (rework pending, stale merged PR) + ci green + no lease → spawn developer (re-develop, NOT advance)
EDGE: judgement MOVE names wrong to-stage (design->testing, skips development) -> escalate
DRIFT: veto:held overlay but no [VETO] ever posted (out-of-band, e.g. #284-286) -> escalate
DRIFT: blocked overlay but no open QUESTION (out-of-band) -> escalate
SECURITY (gh#33): advisor reviewed the current PR head (sha prefix-matches) + ci green → advance to testing
SECURITY (gh#33): advisor reviewed an OLD head (fix pushed since) + ci green → re-dispatch advisor on new head
AUTH (gh#32 inert): VETO lifted by @mallory (NOT in clear_authority) → still veto-clear (inert) + breadcrumb
AUTH (gh#32 inert): VETO lifted by @human (IN clear_authority) → veto-clear, no breadcrumb
gh#56: post-verdict commit, ci pending, advisor reviewed OLD head → noop reason flags re-review pending (not stuck)

_expect.reason_contains: advisor re-reviews once ci_green is green

_name: gh#56: ci pending but advisor reviewed the CURRENT head → plain pending noop, no re-review suffix
SCANNER (gh#39): watch_paths MISS but a content scanner hit → dispatch advisor (content scanner)
SCANNER (gh#39): scanner hit but advisor already reviewed THIS head → advance (no spurious re-trigger)
RISK (gh#41): R3 + gate ON + no DECISION → risk-gate escalates @human (parks for the go)
RISK (gh#41): R3 + gate ON + already escalated this epoch → noop (parked, awaiting DECISION)
RISK (gh#41): R3 + gate ON + human DECISION risk:approved → resume (advance)
RISK (gh#41): missing risk labels + gate ON → R4 fail-closed → risk-gate escalate
RISK (gh#41): R0 + gate ON → low tier never gated → advance
RISK (gh#41): R3 but gate OFF (default) → bypassed entirely → advance (live instance unaffected)
gh#63: terminal.from (canonical real stage) holds, but from_label (worker's literal) differs → advance + non-blocking breadcrumb
gh#63 control: from_label matches stage → advance, NO breadcrumb (default instances unaffected)
